svg.title: OJS 3.3 Editorial Workflow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the five stages of OJS 3.3 submission workflow: Submission, Review, Copyediting, Production, and Publication, with decision points and role actors at each stage.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the author do during OJS submission?')
sendPrompt('What does the section editor do after receiving a submission in OJS?')
sendPrompt('What is desk rejection in OJS?')
sendPrompt('How does reviewer assignment work in OJS 3.3?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a reviewer submits a review in OJS?')
sendPrompt('What editorial decisions can be made after peer review in OJS?')
sendPrompt('How does revise and resubmit work in OJS 3.3?')
sendPrompt('What does a copyeditor do in OJS 3.3?')
sendPrompt('How does author review of copyedits work in OJS?')
sendPrompt('What happens after final copyediting in OJS?')
sendPrompt('What does a layout editor do in OJS production stage?')
sendPrompt('How does proofreading work in OJS?')
sendPrompt('How do you schedule an article for publication in OJS 3.3?')
sendPrompt('What metadata is set before publishing in OJS?')
sendPrompt('How do you publish an issue in OJS 3.3?')
